description: System Orchestration - Trading loop orchestration, error handling and recovery, state management, workflow coordination, and system health monitoring for autonomous trading operations

userStories.title: Set up trading loop orchestration foundation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to set up a trading loop orchestration foundation to coordinate all trading operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/services/trading_loop.py module
Implement TradingLoop class with async architecture
Set up loop scheduling (runs every 1 second)
Implement loop state management (idle, running, paused, stopped, error)
Set up loop configuration (symbols, timeframes, parameters)
Add loop logging and monitoring
Create unit tests for trading loop
Add integration tests with all services
Document trading loop workflow and states

userStories.title: Implement main trading loop workflow
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to implement the main trading loop workflow that orchestrates all trading operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement async loop execution (runs every 1 second)
Orchestrate workflow: data fetch → features → prediction → signal → risk → execution
Implement per-symbol parallel processing (5 symbols simultaneously)
Add workflow step timing (measure latency for each step)
Implement workflow result logging
Add workflow error handling (continue on non-critical errors)
Implement workflow state tracking (current step, results)
Test loop workflow with paper trading
Validate loop completes in < 1 second
Monitor loop performance metrics
userStories.notes: Loop must complete in < 1 second for real-time trading

userStories.title: Implement trading loop control interface
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need to control the trading loop (start, stop, pause, resume) via API.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement start() method to begin trading loop
Implement stop() method to halt trading loop gracefully
Implement pause() method to pause loop temporarily
Implement resume() method to resume paused loop
Add state validation (can't start if already running)
Add state transition logging
Implement loop status API endpoint
Add loop control API endpoints
Test all state transitions
Validate graceful shutdown (close positions, save state)
userStories.notes: Control interface essential for system operation

userStories.title: Implement error handling framework
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need a comprehensive error handling framework to catch and handle all errors gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/error_handling.py module
Implement custom exception classes for each service
Implement error logging with context (timestamp, service, error details)
Implement error severity levels (warning, error, critical)
Implement error alerting (send notifications for critical errors)
Add error tracking (error count per service)
Implement error context preservation (stack trace, variables)
Create unit tests for error handling
Test error scenarios (MT5 disconnect, database error, model error)
Document error handling procedures
userStories.notes: Error handling is critical for 24/7 operation

userStories.title: Implement MT5 connection error recovery
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need to automatically recover from MT5 connection failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement MT5 connection health check (every 10 seconds)
Implement MT5 reconnection logic (exponential backoff: 1s, 5s, 10s, 30s, 60s)
Implement connection state tracking (connected, disconnected, reconnecting)
Pause trading while disconnected
Implement connection recovery validation
Add connection event logging
Implement connection failure alerting
Test reconnection with manual disconnect
Test reconnection with MT5 terminal restart
Validate reconnection succeeds within 5 minutes
userStories.notes: MT5 connections are unreliable, need robust recovery

userStories.title: Implement database error recovery
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need to automatically recover from database connection failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement database health check (every 30 seconds)
Implement database reconnection logic
Implement operation retry on database errors (3 attempts)
Implement operation queuing while disconnected
Implement data consistency checks after reconnection
Add database event logging
Implement database failure alerting
Test recovery with database lock
Test recovery with database restart
Validate no data loss after recovery
userStories.notes: Database errors must not crash the system

userStories.title: Implement model error recovery and fallback
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need to handle model errors and fall back to safe defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement model health check (validate predictions)
Implement model fallback on prediction errors (use last valid prediction)
Implement model reload on corruption
Implement backup model activation
Implement model error logging
Implement model error alerting
Implement model performance degradation detection
Test recovery with model corruption
Test fallback with prediction timeout
Validate fallback prevents trading on bad predictions
userStories.notes: Model errors must not cause bad trades

userStories.title: Implement circuit breaker pattern
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need to implement circuit breakers to prevent cascading failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement circuit breaker for MT5 service (open after 5 consecutive errors)
Implement circuit breaker for database (open after 10 consecutive errors)
Implement circuit breaker for model inference (open after 3 consecutive errors)
Implement circuit breaker states (closed, open, half-open)
Implement automatic reset (half-open after timeout)
Implement circuit breaker logging
Implement circuit breaker monitoring
Test circuit breaker with repeated failures
Test circuit breaker reset after timeout
Validate circuit breaker prevents cascading failures

userStories.title: Implement graceful degradation
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need to implement graceful degradation when services fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement reduced trading mode when services degrade
Implement feature fallback (use cached features if feature engineering fails)
Implement signal filtering (only high confidence signals when model degrades)
Implement position reduction (close partial positions when risk increases)
Implement operation queuing (queue operations when database is slow)
Add degradation logging
Implement degradation alerts
Test degradation scenarios
Validate system continues operating with degraded services
Document degradation modes and triggers

userStories.title: Implement system state management
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to manage system state across restarts and failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement state persistence (save state to database every 30 seconds)
Implement state recovery on startup (load last state)
Implement state validation (check consistency on recovery)
Implement state snapshot (full state before major operations)
Implement state rollback (revert to last good state)
Add state change logging
Implement state synchronization across services
Test state persistence and recovery
Test state rollback after error
Validate state consistency after recovery
userStories.notes: State management enables recovery from failures

userStories.title: Implement system health monitoring
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need comprehensive health monitoring to track system status.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement service health checks (MT5, database, model, trading loop)
Implement system resource monitoring (CPU, memory, disk, network)
Implement performance monitoring (loop execution time, API latency)
Implement trading metrics monitoring (win rate, drawdown, daily P&L)
Implement health score calculation (0-100 scale)
Implement health status API endpoint
Stream health updates via WebSocket
Add health alerting (alert when health score < 70)
Test health monitoring with various scenarios
Validate health monitoring detects issues
userStories.notes: Health monitoring is essential for operations

userStories.title: Implement workflow coordination and dependencies
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to coordinate workflows and manage dependencies between services.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement service dependency graph (data ingestion → features → model → signal → risk → execution)
Implement workflow orchestration (coordinate parallel and sequential steps)
Implement dependency checking (validate services are ready before use)
Implement workflow timeout handling (fail fast on timeout)
Implement workflow result aggregation (combine results from parallel steps)
Add workflow visualization (optional)
Implement workflow logging
Test workflow with various scenarios
Validate workflow handles service failures gracefully
Document workflow dependencies
userStories.notes: Workflow coordination ensures proper execution order

userStories.title: Implement automatic restart and recovery
userStories.description: As a robust system, I need to implement automatic restart and recovery from critical failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement crash detection (watchdog process)
Implement automatic restart on crash
Implement state restoration after restart
Implement recovery logging (what happened, what was recovered)
Implement recovery validation (check system integrity after restart)
Implement restart backoff (exponential backoff for repeated crashes)
Implement manual intervention required flag (for unrecoverable errors)
Test automatic restart with simulated crash
Test state restoration after restart
Validate system recovers to consistent state

userStories.title: Implement event logging and audit trail
userStories.description: As a compliant system, I need to implement comprehensive event logging for audit trails.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement event logging for all trading operations
Implement event logging for all system state changes
Implement event logging for all errors and recoveries
Implement event storage in database (immutable log)
Implement event query API (filter by type, time, service)
Implement event export (CSV, JSON)
Add event retention policy (90 days)
Implement event integrity checking (checksums)
Test event logging with various scenarios
Validate audit trail completeness
userStories.notes: Audit trail essential for compliance and debugging

userStories.title: Implement system diagnostics and debugging tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need diagnostic and debugging tools to troubleshoot system issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement system diagnostics endpoint (aggregate status of all services)
Implement performance profiling (measure execution time for each step)
Implement memory profiling (detect memory leaks)
Implement deadlock detection (detect blocking operations)
Implement diagnostics API endpoint
Implement diagnostics report generation
Implement debug logging (verbose logging for development)
Add diagnostics to system status dashboard
Test diagnostics with various scenarios
Document diagnostic procedures

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must orchestrate trading loop with < 1 second execution time
FR-2: System must handle errors gracefully without crashing
FR-3: System must recover from MT5 connection failures automatically
FR-4: System must recover from database failures automatically
FR-5: System must implement circuit breakers to prevent cascading failures
FR-6: System must persist state and recover on restart
FR-7: System must monitor health of all services
FR-8: System must implement graceful degradation under load
FR-9: System must log all events for audit trail
FR-10: System must provide diagnostic tools for troubleshooting
nonGoals: No distributed tracing (Jaeger, Zipkin) in this phase
No service mesh (Istio, Linkerd) in this phase
No container orchestration (Kubernetes) in this phase
No multi-region deployment in this phase
No chaos engineering in this phase
No disaster recovery with multi-site replication
technicalConsiderations: Error handling must be comprehensive (every operation)
State persistence must be atomic (avoid partial state)
Health monitoring must be real-time (< 5 second latency)
Recovery logic must be tested thoroughly
Logging must be structured and queryable
successMetrics: System recovers from MT5 disconnect in < 5 minutes
System recovers from database failure in < 1 minute
Graceful degradation keeps system running with 50% service failure
State recovery succeeds in > 95% of cases
Health monitoring detects issues within 10 seconds
Diagnostics identify root cause in > 80% of cases

techStack.errorHandling: custom exception framework, tenacity for retry
techStack.monitoring: psutil for system metrics, custom health checks

architecture.tradingLoop: Data Fetch → Features → Prediction → Signal → Risk → Execution → Log (repeat every 1s)
architecture.errorHandling: Try-Catch → Log → Retry/Circuit Breaker → Fallback → Alert
architecture.recoveryFlow: Detect Failure → Pause Trading → Recover Service → Validate → Resume Trading
architecture.stateFlow: Operation → Update State → Persist to DB → On Restart: Load State → Validate → Resume

timeline.phase1: Foundation (Days 1-4): Trading loop setup, state management
timeline.phase2: Error Handling (Days 5-8): Error framework, MT5/database recovery
timeline.phase5: Recovery (Days 16-17): Automatic restart, audit trail, validation
